surfaces.label: Rust SDK
surfaces.role: reference ergonomic SDK over the wire contract

surfaces.label: TypeScript SDK
surfaces.role: public platform SDK wrapper over the generated transport

surfaces.label: Python SDK
surfaces.role: sync-first AI/data/notebook SDK over the canonical HTTP contract

surfaces.label: TraceQL / SQL-ish
surfaces.role: future adapter into the same TraceQuery model

surfaces.label: GraphQL
surfaces.role: future schema-generated adapter into the same TraceQuery model

conformance_scenarios.expected: applies a TableSchema and returns an epoch
writes or replaces one record and returns an epoch
writes multiple records and returns record_count plus epoch
patches selected record fields and preserves untouched fields
returns records and returned_count; cursor metadata is future
returns HybridQueryRow results with typed score components
returns HybridExplain access paths, planner candidates, counters, and timings
hides deleted records from get, scan, query, and explain materialization

conformance_scenarios.wire: Idempotency-Key on mutation and admin routes
conformance_scenarios.expected: same key plus same method/path/body replays the first successful response; body mismatch returns 409
non-2xx responses preserve error string, optional code, status, method, path, and raw body
creates a local snapshot, restores into a separate target, and preserves visible state

future_scenarios.reason: scan currently emits records and returned_count with no cursor metadata
admin jobs are visible as queue state, not a durable job API contract

result_envelope.success: route-specific JSON response bodies defined by docs/api/v1-http.md and docs/api/v1-openapi.json

error.sdk_requirement: SDKs must expose method, path, status when present, raw response body, parsed error string, and parsed optional code

result_envelope.explain: HybridExplain is the shared provenance/freshness/planner explanation object for query and explain surfaces

retry_idempotency.idempotency_retries: mutation/admin routes only when the individual request carries a non-empty Idempotency-Key
retry_idempotency.durability: local data-dir reopen for successful cache writes; not cross-replica and not crash-atomic exactly-once

maintenance_mode_definition: A platform project can use TraceDB through Rust, TypeScript, Python, TraceQL/SQL-ish, or GraphQL and receive the same behavior, same errors, same result shape, and same explain/freshness semantics.
